TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Tang Dezhangan == Piharatengan ci Tang Dezhangan a romi'ad Fingkosi Tang Dezhang (1907 miheca 1 folad 6 romi'ad – 1947 miheca 3 folad 13 romi'ad), o Nansi tamdaw no Taynan, o nano imeng no Dipong ko mama, o Nanhua tamdaw no Taynan ko ina, kaemangan ho mafades ko mama itiya saka no ina a ngangan ko kacingangan, nanoya ira ko cecay laloma'an kanpoyaku isingan ci Yo sang ko midipotay palahad mato'as. Talacowa pakoyoc ko laloma'an, nika awaay ko kasamsam, oya saka enem pitilid a singsi ci Lin sin mahemek to katadamaan o "padamaay to masafaay" tamdaw ko faloco'. Malakakeridan no imeng maepec no Dipong kakeridan ​Misawad to Koritu kakko i, maala ni Tang Dezhangan ko Taynan sihan kakko, ikor misawad minokay i Yucin malingad, miliyaw haca miseking to Taypi imeng mikonling a malaimeng. I 1939 miheca, o ising no Dipong parakat to tosiya pakaripa' to kapah no Taywan, militado to katadamaan mapalasawad ko kaciraraw, oya sa ci Tang Dezhangan mikadkad to sakacitodong, nika o tadamaanay cipaysoay koya tamdaw, palafac han to papisooy. ​​Nanoya tayra i Dipong ci Tang Dezhangan, minokay i niyaro' no mama ningra mifalic to ngangan ci Sakai Noriaki, micomod to Tokyo Cuodaykaku, maala ko Yokyo komoin oyopi siho kankeisa, I 1943 miheca minokay tayni Taywan pasi Sotoku no kyuten mala fingkosi, miteka mala mo'ecelay ko pidemak to saka Taywan tamdaw, caay ka hakowa ko piala to sapadafoh, roma mipatadoay mala fingkosi no pakoyocay tamdaw, nanoya rarid sa masasiwtoc to Dipong a tamdaw. Mitoro' to "malatapangan no Congko" o cacimipatalaay to sapikelot ​Ikor no saka 2 lalood, micalap ko Conghuaminko to Taywan, oya ci Chen Yi ko mikowanay ona mitahidang ci Tang Dezhangan mala "Taiwan so komuin kensuso" a kakeridan, sakitoni, sowal sa cingra: "Mala tapang no Congko, o cacimipatalaay to sapikelot, mana'ay kako mipatay to faloco' no niyah.", nanoya kana'aen ningra ko pitahidang. ​​Dengan o kalafingkosi i, mala o citodongay kakeridan no kasalekapot "Taynansi renmin ciyo sadama wiyinhuy", 1946 miheca miliko cingra to Su kikay kiing, sararikoran ni Han shikuan, malamicokeray a iing. Caay kapasadak to ngangan ​I 1947 miheca, malacitodongay kakeridan ci Tang Dezhangan to "Taynansi lefisal no 228 demak misalofay wuyinhuy" itiya, i saka 21 sacefang nai Takao micomod i Taynansi i, repetan ci Tang Dezhangan. ​​Na marepet to pina romi'ad, oya citodongay imeng micomod to kamaro'an nira, o sapidipotaw to 'alomanay finawlan no Taynansi tamdaw, miliyang to sakarepet, milongoc to romi'ad, todohen koya ngangan, pa'orip to 'alomanay tamdaw no Taynan ato Chengkung daykako a mitiliday a caay ka fades. Ikor, marepet no sofitay no Conghuaminko. Milaha to wasoy Taywan a tamdaw ​3 folad 12 romi'ad mafalih ko katating a masalafii, mapetek ko fadowac to pina pekpekan no kowang, masefed talaaikor ko kamay, mapahecek ko citiliday kilang a paya, mapakalic to tolak, mililis to lalan no maci, ikor mapatayra i pisalamaan no Taynan a mipatay. ​​O sowal no pakanengnengay, o kakowangen to a mipatay masatamdaw awaay talatalaw a nengnengen, pasi'alomanay ko nengneng a matawa, 'ayaw no pidemak a mipatay cokaren ho no sofitay, patangic a mikitosor papihinokop. ​​​Maliyang cingra a mikitosor itiya, misatata'ang marketer "o kokong a sofitay no Conghuaminko". Milaha "wasoy Taywan a tamdaw" saan nanoya nai tangal mikowangko timora, mapatay i maforikat ko mata, halafin ko katomireng ta mata'enang. Oya citodongay mipatay a sofitay milaha "Tamate, nengnengen kamo o Taywan tamdaw, sapiliyangaw ho haw?" saan. ​​​​Ikor to pipatay ci Tang Dezhangan, caay papialaen ko laloma'an to tireng a milosimet, papifadesen ho itira, o pingitangit to, ta mihayda milolod to oray, nika caay ho kanga'ay miala panokay. O romi'ad to mo'ecel ato kacodah a piherateng ​2014 miheca o Taynansi sifo misetek to 228 mafadesay ci Tang Dezhang fingkosi kapatayan i 3 folad 13 romi'ad ono "Taynansi o romi'ad to mo'ecel ato kacodah a piherateng", piharateng i cingraan to katadamaan ato macodahay a salo'afang no Taywan. ​Mikawitay: Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan == piħaratəŋan ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ fiŋko~usi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋ (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), o~u nansi tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan, o~u nano~u iməŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u mama, o~u nanħo~u~ua tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan ko~u ina, kaəmaŋan ħo~u mafaɬ~ɮəs ko~u mama itija saka no~u ina a ŋaŋan ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan, nano~uja ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan kanpo~ujako~u~u isiŋan ʦi jo~u saŋ ko~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj paɾaħaɬ~ɮ mato~uʡas. taɾaʦo~uwa pako~ujo~uʦ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, nika awaaj ko~u kasamsam, o~uja saka ənəm pitiɾiɬ~ɮ a siŋsi ʦi ɾin sin maħəmək to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan o~u "paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u masafaaj" tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ. maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u iməŋ maəpəʦ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan *misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~urito~u~u kakko~u i, maaɾa ni taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan ko~u tajnan siħan kakko~u, iko~ur misawaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj i jo~u~uʦin maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw ħaʦa misəkiŋ to~u tajpi iməŋ miko~unɾiŋ a maɾaiməŋ. i **** miħəʦa, o~u isiŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ parakat to~u to~usija pakaripaʡ to~u kapaħ no~u tajwan, miɾitaɬ~ɮo~u to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaʦiraraw, o~uja sa ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ to~u sakaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, nika o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦipajso~uaj ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾafaʦ ħan to~u papiso~uo~uj. **nano~uja tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan, mino~ukaj i nijaro~uʡ no~u mama niŋra mifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan ʦi sakai no~uriaki, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u to~ukjo~u ʦo~u~uo~uɬ~ɮajkako~u~u, maaɾa ko~u jo~ukjo~u ko~umo~uin o~ujo~upi siħo~u kankəisa, i **** miħəʦa mino~ukaj tajni tajwan pasi so~uto~uko~u~u no~u kjo~u~utən maɾa fiŋko~usi, mitəka maɾa mo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u saka tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u piaɾa to~u sapaɬ~ɮafo~uħ, ro~uma mipataɬ~ɮo~uaj maɾa fiŋko~usi no~u pako~ujo~uʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja rariɬ~ɮ sa masasiwto~uʦ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw. mito~uro~uʡ to~u "maɾatapaŋan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u" o~u ʦaʦimipataɾaaj to~u sapikəɾo~ut *iko~ur no~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦaɾap ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u to~u tajwan, o~uja ʦi ʦħən ji ko~u miko~uwanaj o~una mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan maɾa "taiwan so~u ko~umo~u~uin kənso~u~uso~u" a kakəriɬ~ɮan, sakito~uni, so~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra: "maɾa tapaŋ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, o~u ʦaʦimipataɾaaj to~u sapikəɾo~ut, manaʡaj kako~u mipataj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ.", nano~uja kanaʡaən niŋra ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ. **ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kaɾafiŋko~usi i, maɾa o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kasaɾəkapo~ut "tajnansi rənmin ʦijo~u saɬ~ɮama wijinħo~u~uj", **** miħəʦa miɾiko~u ʦiŋra to~u so~u~u kikaj kiiŋ, sarariko~uran ni ħan sħiko~u~uan, maɾamiʦo~ukəraj a iiŋ. ʦaaj kapasaɬ~ɮak to~u ŋaŋan *i **** miħəʦa, maɾaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan to~u "tajnansi ɾəfisaɾ no~u *** ɬ~ɮəmak misaɾo~ufaj wo~u~ujinħo~u~uj" itija, i saka ** saʦəfaŋ nai takao~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tajnansi i, rəpətan ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan. **na marəpət to~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj iməŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kamaro~uʡan nira, o~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj finawɾan no~u tajnansi tamɬ~ɮaw, miɾijaŋ to~u sakarəpət, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ko~uja ŋaŋan, paʡo~urip to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan ato~u ʦħəŋko~u~uŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a ʦaaj ka faɬ~ɮəs. iko~ur, marəpət no~u so~ufitaj no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u. miɾaħa to~u waso~uj tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mafaɾiħ ko~u katatiŋ a masaɾafii, mapətək ko~u faɬ~ɮo~uwaʦ to~u pina pəkpəkan no~u ko~uwaŋ, masəfəɬ~ɮ taɾaaiko~ur ko~u kamaj, mapaħəʦək ko~u ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮaj kiɾaŋ a paja, mapakaɾiʦ to~u to~uɾak, miɾiɾis to~u ɾaɾan no~u maʦi, iko~ur mapatajra i pisaɾamaan no~u tajnan a mipataj. **o~u so~uwaɾ no~u pakanəŋnəŋaj, o~u kako~uwaŋən to~u a mipataj masatamɬ~ɮaw awaaj taɾataɾaw a nəŋnəŋən, pasiʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u nəŋnəŋ a matawa, ʡajaw no~u piɬ~ɮəmak a mipataj ʦo~ukarən ħo~u no~u so~ufitaj, pataŋiʦ a mikito~uso~ur papiħino~uko~up. ***maɾijaŋ ʦiŋra a mikito~uso~ur itija, misatataʡaŋ markətər "o~u ko~uko~uŋ a so~ufitaj no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u". miɾaħa "waso~uj tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw" saan nano~uja nai taŋaɾ miko~uwaŋko~u timo~ura, mapataj i mafo~urikat ko~u mata, ħaɾafin ko~u kato~umirəŋ ta mataʡənaŋ. o~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mipataj a so~ufitaj miɾaħa "tamatə, nəŋnəŋən kamo~u o~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw, sapiɾijaŋaw ħo~u ħaw?" saan. ****iko~ur to~u pipataj ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan, ʦaaj papiaɾaən ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan to~u tirəŋ a miɾo~usimət, papifaɬ~ɮəsən ħo~u itira, o~u piŋitaŋit to~u, ta miħajɬ~ɮa miɾo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮ to~u o~uraj, nika ʦaaj ħo~u kaŋaʡaj miaɾa pano~ukaj. o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʡəʦəɾ ato~u kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ a piħəratəŋ ***** miħəʦa o~u tajnansi sifo~u misətək to~u *** mafaɬ~ɮəsaj ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋ fiŋko~usi kapatajan i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uno~u "tajnansi o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʡəʦəɾ ato~u kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ a piħəratəŋ", piħaratəŋ i ʦiŋraan to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan ato~u maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj a saɾo~uʡafaŋ no~u tajwan. *mikawitaj: sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj
S.FORM: == Tang Dezhangan == Piharatengan ci Tang Dezhangan a romi'ad Fingkosi Tang Dezhang (1907 miheca 1 folad 6 romi'ad – 1947 miheca 3 folad 13 romi'ad), o Nansi tamdaw no Taynan, o nano imeng no Dipong ko mama, o Nanhua tamdaw no Taynan ko ina, kaemangan ho mafades ko mama itiya saka no ina a ngangan ko kacingangan, nanoya ira ko cecay laloma'an kanpoyaku isingan ci Yo sang ko midipotay palahad mato'as. Talacowa pakoyoc ko laloma'an, nika awaay ko kasamsam, oya saka enem pitilid a singsi ci Lin sin mahemek to katadamaan o "padamaay to masafaay" tamdaw ko faloco'. Malakakeridan no imeng maepec no Dipong kakeridan ​Misawad to Koritu kakko i, maala ni Tang Dezhangan ko Taynan sihan kakko, ikor misawad minokay i Yucin malingad, miliyaw haca miseking to Taypi imeng mikonling a malaimeng. I 1939 miheca, o ising no Dipong parakat to tosiya pakaripa' to kapah no Taywan, militado to katadamaan mapalasawad ko kaciraraw, oya sa ci Tang Dezhangan mikadkad to sakacitodong, nika o tadamaanay cipaysoay koya tamdaw, palafac han to papisooy. ​​Nanoya tayra i Dipong ci Tang Dezhangan, minokay i niyaro' no mama ningra mifalic to ngangan ci Sakai Noriaki, micomod to Tokyo Cuodaykaku, maala ko Yokyo komoin oyopi siho kankeisa, I 1943 miheca minokay tayni Taywan pasi Sotoku no kyuten mala fingkosi, miteka mala mo'ecelay ko pidemak to saka Taywan tamdaw, caay ka hakowa ko piala to sapadafoh, roma mipatadoay mala fingkosi no pakoyocay tamdaw, nanoya rarid sa masasiwtoc to Dipong a tamdaw. Mitoro' to "malatapangan no Congko" o cacimipatalaay to sapikelot ​Ikor no saka 2 lalood, micalap ko Conghuaminko to Taywan, oya ci Chen Yi ko mikowanay ona mitahidang ci Tang Dezhangan mala "Taiwan so komuin kensuso" a kakeridan, sakitoni, sowal sa cingra: "Mala tapang no Congko, o cacimipatalaay to sapikelot, mana'ay kako mipatay to faloco' no niyah.", nanoya kana'aen ningra ko pitahidang. ​​Dengan o kalafingkosi i, mala o citodongay kakeridan no kasalekapot "Taynansi renmin ciyo sadama wiyinhuy", 1946 miheca miliko cingra to Su kikay kiing, sararikoran ni Han shikuan, malamicokeray a iing. Caay kapasadak to ngangan ​I 1947 miheca, malacitodongay kakeridan ci Tang Dezhangan to "Taynansi lefisal no 228 demak misalofay wuyinhuy" itiya, i saka 21 sacefang nai Takao micomod i Taynansi i, repetan ci Tang Dezhangan. ​​Na marepet to pina romi'ad, oya citodongay imeng micomod to kamaro'an nira, o sapidipotaw to 'alomanay finawlan no Taynansi tamdaw, miliyang to sakarepet, milongoc to romi'ad, todohen koya ngangan, pa'orip to 'alomanay tamdaw no Taynan ato Chengkung daykako a mitiliday a caay ka fades. Ikor, marepet no sofitay no Conghuaminko. Milaha to wasoy Taywan a tamdaw ​3 folad 12 romi'ad mafalih ko katating a masalafii, mapetek ko fadowac to pina pekpekan no kowang, masefed talaaikor ko kamay, mapahecek ko citiliday kilang a paya, mapakalic to tolak, mililis to lalan no maci, ikor mapatayra i pisalamaan no Taynan a mipatay. ​​O sowal no pakanengnengay, o kakowangen to a mipatay masatamdaw awaay talatalaw a nengnengen, pasi'alomanay ko nengneng a matawa, 'ayaw no pidemak a mipatay cokaren ho no sofitay, patangic a mikitosor papihinokop. ​​​Maliyang cingra a mikitosor itiya, misatata'ang marketer "o kokong a sofitay no Conghuaminko". Milaha "wasoy Taywan a tamdaw" saan nanoya nai tangal mikowangko timora, mapatay i maforikat ko mata, halafin ko katomireng ta mata'enang. Oya citodongay mipatay a sofitay milaha "Tamate, nengnengen kamo o Taywan tamdaw, sapiliyangaw ho haw?" saan. ​​​​Ikor to pipatay ci Tang Dezhangan, caay papialaen ko laloma'an to tireng a milosimet, papifadesen ho itira, o pingitangit to, ta mihayda milolod to oray, nika caay ho kanga'ay miala panokay. O romi'ad to mo'ecel ato kacodah a piherateng ​2014 miheca o Taynansi sifo misetek to 228 mafadesay ci Tang Dezhang fingkosi kapatayan i 3 folad 13 romi'ad ono "Taynansi o romi'ad to mo'ecel ato kacodah a piherateng", piharateng i cingraan to katadamaan ato macodahay a salo'afang no Taywan. ​Mikawitay: Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan == piħaratəŋan ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ fiŋko~usi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋ (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), o~u nansi tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan, o~u nano~u iməŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u mama, o~u nanħo~u~ua tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan ko~u ina, kaəmaŋan ħo~u mafaɬ~ɮəs ko~u mama itija saka no~u ina a ŋaŋan ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan, nano~uja ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan kanpo~ujako~u~u isiŋan ʦi jo~u saŋ ko~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj paɾaħaɬ~ɮ mato~uʡas. taɾaʦo~uwa pako~ujo~uʦ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, nika awaaj ko~u kasamsam, o~uja saka ənəm pitiɾiɬ~ɮ a siŋsi ʦi ɾin sin maħəmək to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan o~u "paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u masafaaj" tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ. maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u iməŋ maəpəʦ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan *misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~urito~u~u kakko~u i, maaɾa ni taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan ko~u tajnan siħan kakko~u, iko~ur misawaɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj i jo~u~uʦin maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw ħaʦa misəkiŋ to~u tajpi iməŋ miko~unɾiŋ a maɾaiməŋ. i **** miħəʦa, o~u isiŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ parakat to~u to~usija pakaripaʡ to~u kapaħ no~u tajwan, miɾitaɬ~ɮo~u to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaʦiraraw, o~uja sa ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ to~u sakaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, nika o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦipajso~uaj ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾafaʦ ħan to~u papiso~uo~uj. **nano~uja tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan, mino~ukaj i nijaro~uʡ no~u mama niŋra mifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan ʦi sakai no~uriaki, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u to~ukjo~u ʦo~u~uo~uɬ~ɮajkako~u~u, maaɾa ko~u jo~ukjo~u ko~umo~uin o~ujo~upi siħo~u kankəisa, i **** miħəʦa mino~ukaj tajni tajwan pasi so~uto~uko~u~u no~u kjo~u~utən maɾa fiŋko~usi, mitəka maɾa mo~uʡəʦəɾaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak to~u saka tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u piaɾa to~u sapaɬ~ɮafo~uħ, ro~uma mipataɬ~ɮo~uaj maɾa fiŋko~usi no~u pako~ujo~uʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja rariɬ~ɮ sa masasiwto~uʦ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw. mito~uro~uʡ to~u "maɾatapaŋan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u" o~u ʦaʦimipataɾaaj to~u sapikəɾo~ut *iko~ur no~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦaɾap ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u to~u tajwan, o~uja ʦi ʦħən ji ko~u miko~uwanaj o~una mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan maɾa "taiwan so~u ko~umo~u~uin kənso~u~uso~u" a kakəriɬ~ɮan, sakito~uni, so~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra: "maɾa tapaŋ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, o~u ʦaʦimipataɾaaj to~u sapikəɾo~ut, manaʡaj kako~u mipataj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ.", nano~uja kanaʡaən niŋra ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ. **ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kaɾafiŋko~usi i, maɾa o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kasaɾəkapo~ut "tajnansi rənmin ʦijo~u saɬ~ɮama wijinħo~u~uj", **** miħəʦa miɾiko~u ʦiŋra to~u so~u~u kikaj kiiŋ, sarariko~uran ni ħan sħiko~u~uan, maɾamiʦo~ukəraj a iiŋ. ʦaaj kapasaɬ~ɮak to~u ŋaŋan *i **** miħəʦa, maɾaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan to~u "tajnansi ɾəfisaɾ no~u *** ɬ~ɮəmak misaɾo~ufaj wo~u~ujinħo~u~uj" itija, i saka ** saʦəfaŋ nai takao~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tajnansi i, rəpətan ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan. **na marəpət to~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj iməŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kamaro~uʡan nira, o~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj finawɾan no~u tajnansi tamɬ~ɮaw, miɾijaŋ to~u sakarəpət, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən ko~uja ŋaŋan, paʡo~urip to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajnan ato~u ʦħəŋko~u~uŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a ʦaaj ka faɬ~ɮəs. iko~ur, marəpət no~u so~ufitaj no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u. miɾaħa to~u waso~uj tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mafaɾiħ ko~u katatiŋ a masaɾafii, mapətək ko~u faɬ~ɮo~uwaʦ to~u pina pəkpəkan no~u ko~uwaŋ, masəfəɬ~ɮ taɾaaiko~ur ko~u kamaj, mapaħəʦək ko~u ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮaj kiɾaŋ a paja, mapakaɾiʦ to~u to~uɾak, miɾiɾis to~u ɾaɾan no~u maʦi, iko~ur mapatajra i pisaɾamaan no~u tajnan a mipataj. **o~u so~uwaɾ no~u pakanəŋnəŋaj, o~u kako~uwaŋən to~u a mipataj masatamɬ~ɮaw awaaj taɾataɾaw a nəŋnəŋən, pasiʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u nəŋnəŋ a matawa, ʡajaw no~u piɬ~ɮəmak a mipataj ʦo~ukarən ħo~u no~u so~ufitaj, pataŋiʦ a mikito~uso~ur papiħino~uko~up. ***maɾijaŋ ʦiŋra a mikito~uso~ur itija, misatataʡaŋ markətər "o~u ko~uko~uŋ a so~ufitaj no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u". miɾaħa "waso~uj tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw" saan nano~uja nai taŋaɾ miko~uwaŋko~u timo~ura, mapataj i mafo~urikat ko~u mata, ħaɾafin ko~u kato~umirəŋ ta mataʡənaŋ. o~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mipataj a so~ufitaj miɾaħa "tamatə, nəŋnəŋən kamo~u o~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw, sapiɾijaŋaw ħo~u ħaw?" saan. ****iko~ur to~u pipataj ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋan, ʦaaj papiaɾaən ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan to~u tirəŋ a miɾo~usimət, papifaɬ~ɮəsən ħo~u itira, o~u piŋitaŋit to~u, ta miħajɬ~ɮa miɾo~uɾo~uɬ~ɮ to~u o~uraj, nika ʦaaj ħo~u kaŋaʡaj miaɾa pano~ukaj. o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʡəʦəɾ ato~u kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ a piħəratəŋ ***** miħəʦa o~u tajnansi sifo~u misətək to~u *** mafaɬ~ɮəsaj ʦi taŋ ɬ~ɮə*ħaŋ fiŋko~usi kapatajan i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~uno~u "tajnansi o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u mo~uʡəʦəɾ ato~u kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ a piħəratəŋ", piħaratəŋ i ʦiŋraan to~u kataɬ~ɮamaan ato~u maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj a saɾo~uʡafaŋ no~u tajwan. *mikawitaj: sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj
